load-and-edit-pdf-pages.title: Load and Edit PDF Pages with PdfPageEditor
load-and-edit-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to bind a PDF file using PdfPageEditor, apply rotation and zoom settings, and save the edited document.

in-memory-pdf-page-manipulation.title: In-Memory PDF Page Manipulation with PdfPageEditor
in-memory-pdf-page-manipulation.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a memory stream, rotating a page using PdfPageEditor, and saving the edited document back to a stream without using the file system.

edit-pdf-pages-save-new-file.title: Edit PDF Pages with PdfPageEditor and Save to New File
edit-pdf-pages-save-new-file.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with PdfPageEditor, applying zoom and rotation to all pages, and saving the edited document to a new file.

save-modified-pdf-to-memorystream.title: Save Modified PDF to MemoryStream Using PdfPageEditor
save-modified-pdf-to-memorystream.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF, applying a page edit (zoom), and saving the modified document directly to a MemoryStream to avoid disk I/O.

rotate-second-page-pdf-90-degrees.title: Rotate Second Page of PDF by 90 Degrees
rotate-second-page-pdf-90-degrees.description: Shows how to rotate page 2 of a PDF by 90 degrees using the PdfPageEditor PageRotations dictionary.

rotate-specific-pdf-pages.title: Rotate Specific PDF Pages Using PdfPageEditor
rotate-specific-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to rotate pages 3, 5, and 7 of a PDF by 180 degrees using the PdfPageEditor facade.

rotate-specific-pdf-page-using-pdfpageed.title: Rotate Specific PDF Page Using PdfPageEditor
rotate-specific-pdf-page-using-pdfpageed.description: Shows how to rotate page 4 of a PDF document by 180 degrees using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

retrieve-page-size-using-pdfpageeditor.title: Retrieve Page Size Using PdfPageEditor
retrieve-page-size-using-pdfpageeditor.description: Shows how to load a PDF with PdfPageEditor, obtain the width and height of a specific page, and log the dimensions.

retrieve-page-rotation.title: Retrieve Rotation Angle of a PDF Page
retrieve-page-rotation.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with PdfPageEditor and get the rotation angle of page 4 using GetPageRotation.

resize-page-to-letter-size.title: Resize Specific PDF Page to Letter Size
resize-page-to-letter-size.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to change the size of a single PDF page (page 6) to the Letter format and save the result.

set-page-zoom-to-150-percent.title: Set Page Zoom to 150% Using PdfPageEditor
set-page-zoom-to-150-percent.description: Demonstrates how to change the zoom level of a specific PDF page (page 3) to 150% using the PdfPageEditor facade.

zoom-even-pages-pdf.title: Zoom Even Pages of PDF to 1.2x
zoom-even-pages-pdf.description: Shows how to apply a 1.2 zoom factor to all even‑numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

add-fade-transition-to-first-pdf-page.title: Add Fade Transition to First PDF Page
add-fade-transition-to-first-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to set a fade transition of two seconds on the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

apply-dissolve-transition-to-pdf-page.title: Apply Dissolve Transition to a PDF Page
apply-dissolve-transition-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to add a three‑second dissolve transition to page 5 of a PDF document.

set-display-duration-page-five.title: Set Display Duration for a Specific PDF Page
set-display-duration-page-five.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to set the display duration of page 5 to five seconds for a PDF slideshow.

left-align-page-two.title: Left Align Content of Page Two in PDF
left-align-page-two.description: Demonstrates how to left‑justify the content of the second page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

vertically-align-page3-top.title: Vertically Align Page 3 to Top Using PdfPageEditor
vertically-align-page3-top.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade to align the content of the third page of a PDF document to the top edge.

resize-pdf-page-contents-10-percent-marg.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with 10% Margins
resize-pdf-page-contents-10-percent-marg.description: Shows how to enlarge the margins of every page in a PDF by 10% using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.ResizeContents with default margin parameters.

resize-specific-pdf-pages-with-custom-ma.title: Resize Specific PDF Pages with Custom Margins
resize-specific-pdf-pages-with-custom-ma.description: Demonstrates how to resize the contents of selected PDF pages (pages 2 and 4) using custom left and right margins via the PdfFileEditor facade.

batch-rotate-first-page-pdfs.title: Batch Rotate First Page of PDFs
batch-rotate-first-page-pdfs.description: Shows how to loop through a directory of PDF files and rotate the first page of each document by 90 degrees using the PdfPageEditor facade.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-a4.title: Batch Convert PDFs to A4 Page Size
batch-convert-pdfs-to-a4.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade to resize multiple PDF files to A4 dimensions and save the results with a suffix.

rotate-resize-pdf-page-letter.title: Rotate and Resize PDF Page to Letter Size
rotate-resize-pdf-page-letter.description: Shows how to rotate page 3 by 90° and change its dimensions to Letter size in a single operation using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

zoom-selected-non-consecutive-pdf-pages.title: Zoom Selected Non-Consecutive PDF Pages
zoom-selected-non-consecutive-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfPageEditor to apply a common zoom factor to specific non‑consecutive pages of a PDF document.

set-page-transition-duration.title: Set Page Transition Duration for Selected PDF Pages
set-page-transition-duration.description: Demonstrates how to specify a range of pages using the PdfPageEditor facade and set each page's transition duration to one second.

rotate-pdf-pages-with-validation.title: Rotate All Pages of a PDF with Validation
rotate-pdf-pages-with-validation.description: Shows how to validate a rotation angle (0, 90, 180, 270) and apply it to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

handle-invalid-page-rotation.title: Handle Invalid Page Rotation with PdfPageEditor
handle-invalid-page-rotation.description: Demonstrates catching an InvalidValueFormatException when assigning an unsupported rotation value to a PDF page using PdfPageEditor and then applying a valid rotation.

create-contentsresizeparameters-with-uni.title: Create ContentsResizeParameters with Uniform Margins
create-contentsresizeparameters-with-uni.description: Shows how to instantiate a ContentsResizeParameters object with absolute margins of five points on each side, ready to be used with PdfFileEditor methods.

create-contents-resize-parameters-15-per.title: Create ContentsResizeParameters with 15% Uniform Margins
create-contents-resize-parameters-15-per.description: Demonstrates how to create a ContentsResizeParameters object with uniform 15% margins on all sides using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

apply-different-zoom-levels-to-pdf-pages.title: Apply Different Zoom Levels to PDF Pages
apply-different-zoom-levels-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to assign individual zoom factors to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

apply-fade-transition-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Apply Fade Transition to All PDF Pages
apply-fade-transition-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to set a dissolve (fade) transition on every page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor for a consistent slideshow effect.

assign-page-transitions-based-on-content.title: Assign Page Transitions Based on Content Type
assign-page-transitions-based-on-content.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF pages and apply different transition effects depending on whether the page contains images, form XObjects, or other content using Aspose.Pdf facades.

set-per-page-display-duration-based-on-w.title: Set Per-Page Display Duration Based on Word Count
set-per-page-display-duration-based-on-w.description: Shows how to calculate a display duration for each PDF page proportional to its word count and apply the duration using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

edit-pdf-in-memory-using-pdfpageeditor.title: Edit PDF In-Memory Using PdfPageEditor
edit-pdf-in-memory-using-pdfpageeditor.description: Shows how to create a PDF in a MemoryStream, apply zoom and rotation with PdfPageEditor, and save the edited PDF to another MemoryStream.

chain-page-rotation-size-zoom.title: Chain Page Rotation, Size, and Zoom Modifications
chain-page-rotation-size-zoom.description: Shows how to use PdfPageEditor to rotate pages, set a new page size, and apply a zoom factor in a single operation before saving the PDF.

reset-rotation-of-pdf-page.title: Reset Rotation of a PDF Page
reset-rotation-of-pdf-page.description: Shows how to reset the rotation of a specific PDF page (page 6) to 0 degrees using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

revert-pdf-page-size.title: Revert PDF Page Size to Original Dimensions
revert-pdf-page-size.description: Shows how to capture a page's original size, modify it, and then restore the original dimensions using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

log-pdf-page-dimensions-rotations.title: Log PDF Page Dimensions and Rotations Before and After Edit
log-pdf-page-dimensions-rotations.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade to record each page's size and rotation before and after applying edits, writing the audit information to a text file.

retrieve-pdf-page-sizes-with-error-handl.title: Retrieve PDF Page Sizes with Error Handling
retrieve-pdf-page-sizes-with-error-handl.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfPageEditor to obtain the dimensions of specific PDF pages and safely handle requests for non‑existent pages using try‑catch blocks.

apply-left-horizontal-alignment-to-pdf-p.title: Apply Left Horizontal Alignment to All PDF Pages
apply-left-horizontal-alignment-to-pdf-p.description: Shows how to use PdfPageEditor to set the horizontal alignment of every page in a PDF to left and save the modified document.

apply-vertical-alignment-to-selected-pdf.title: Apply Vertical Alignment to Selected PDF Pages
apply-vertical-alignment-to-selected-pdf.description: Shows how to use PdfPageEditor to vertically align the content of specific pages to the top of the page.

apply-boxout-transition-to-pdf-page.title: Apply BoxOut Transition to PDF Page
apply-boxout-transition-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to set a BoxOut page transition with a three‑second duration on a specific page using the PdfPageEditor facade.

set-cover-transition-on-pdf-page.title: Set Cover Transition on PDF Page
set-cover-transition-on-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to apply a one‑second Cover page transition to page 4 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

set-zoom-of-page-to-75-percent.title: Set Zoom of Specific PDF Page to 75%
set-zoom-of-page-to-75-percent.description: Shows how to change the zoom level of page 5 in a PDF to 75% using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

set-zoom-on-specific-pdf-page.title: Set Zoom on Specific PDF Page
set-zoom-on-specific-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to apply a 2.0 (200%) zoom to page 7 of a PDF using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor facade.

resize-pdf-contents-negative-margin.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with 5% Negative Margin
resize-pdf-contents-negative-margin.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to shrink the contents of every page to 95% of the original size, applying a uniform 5% negative margin.

add-20-percent-margins-to-pdf-pages.title: Add 20% Margins to PDF Pages
add-20-percent-margins-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to add 20 % white margins around all pages of a PDF using the PdfFileEditor facade.

change-pdf-page-orientation-to-landscape.title: Change PDF Page Orientation to Landscape
change-pdf-page-orientation-to-landscape.description: Loads a PDF, sets each page's dimensions to A4 landscape size, and saves the document, converting the orientation from portrait to landscape.

convert-pdf-page-portrait-to-landscape.title: Convert PDF Page from Portrait to Landscape
convert-pdf-page-portrait-to-landscape.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF page's orientation from portrait to landscape by swapping the width and height via the PageSize property and rotating the content 90 degrees using the PdfPageEditor facade.

rotate-pdf-page-preserve-transition.title: Rotate PDF Page While Preserving Transition Effect
rotate-pdf-page-preserve-transition.description: Demonstrates how to rotate a specific PDF page by 180 degrees using PdfPageEditor while keeping any existing transition settings intact.

resize-and-rotate-pdf-page.title: Resize PDF Page Contents and Rotate by 90 Degrees
resize-and-rotate-pdf-page.description: Shows how to shrink the contents of a PDF page to 80 % of its original size and then rotate the page 90° using Aspose.Pdf facades.

save-pdf-incremental-update.title: Save PDF with Incremental Update Using PdfFileMend
save-pdf-incremental-update.description: Shows how to open a PDF with read/write access, apply modifications via the PdfFileMend facade, and save the document using incremental update to keep the original file structure.

edit-pdf-with-backup-using-pdfcontentedi.title: Edit PDF and Preserve Original with Backup
edit-pdf-with-backup-using-pdfcontentedi.description: Shows how to create a backup of a PDF, modify the original using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor, and save the edited version as a new file while keeping the source unchanged.

set-display-duration-pdf-slideshow.title: Set Display Duration for PDF Slideshow Pages
set-display-duration-pdf-slideshow.description: Demonstrates how to set the display duration for each page in a PDF to create a timed slideshow using the PdfPageEditor facade.

apply-split-transition-to-pdf-page.title: Apply Split Transition to PDF Page
apply-split-transition-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to set a split page transition with a 2‑second duration on page three of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

disable-page-transition-animation.title: Disable Page Transition Animation on a Specific PDF Page
disable-page-transition-animation.description: Shows how to set the transition duration to zero for page 6 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor, thereby disabling the page transition animation.

apply-different-page-transitions.title: Apply Different Page Transitions Sequentially in a PDF
apply-different-page-transitions.description: Shows how to assign distinct transition effects to individual pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

set-pdf-page-zoom-to-100.title: Set PDF Page Zoom to 100% Using PdfPageEditor
set-pdf-page-zoom-to-100.description: Demonstrates how to set the zoom level of all pages in a PDF to 1.0 (100%) using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor facade.

zoom-odd-pages-pdf.title: Zoom Odd Pages of PDF to 120%
zoom-odd-pages-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfPageEditor to apply a 1.2 zoom factor to only the odd-numbered pages of a PDF and save the modified document.

zoom-even-pages-to-80-percent.title: Zoom Even-Numbered PDF Pages to 80%
zoom-even-pages-to-80-percent.description: Demonstrates how to reduce the visual size of all even-numbered pages in a PDF by applying a 0.8 zoom factor using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

resize-specific-pdf-pages-to-us-letter.title: Resize Specific PDF Pages to US Letter Size
resize-specific-pdf-pages-to-us-letter.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade to change the page size of selected pages (3‑6) to US Letter dimensions and save the modified document.

set-last-page-a5-booklet.title: Set Last Page Size to A5 for Booklet PDF
set-last-page-a5-booklet.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, change the last page's dimensions to A5 for a compact booklet format, and save the modified document.

rotate-every-third-pdf-page-landscape.title: Rotate Every Third PDF Page to Landscape
rotate-every-third-pdf-page-landscape.description: Demonstrates how to rotate every third page of a PDF by 270 degrees using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade, resulting in alternating landscape orientation.

retrieve-page-size-after-rotation.title: Retrieve Page Size After Rotation
retrieve-page-size-after-rotation.description: Shows how to rotate a PDF page with PdfPageEditor and then read the updated page dimensions to verify the new orientation.

check-page-rotation-after-resizing.title: Check Page Rotation Before and After Resizing a PDF Page
check-page-rotation-after-resizing.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve a PDF page's rotation, change the page size using PdfPageEditor, and verify that the rotation value remains unchanged.

apply-custom-page-transitions.title: Apply Custom Page Transitions Based on Index
apply-custom-page-transitions.description: Shows how to set different transition effects for each PDF page using PdfPageEditor, selecting the effect by page index and saving the modified document.

set-per-page-display-duration.title: Set Per-Page Display Duration in PDF
set-per-page-display-duration.description: Demonstrates how to assign a different display duration to each page of a PDF using PdfPageEditor, increasing the duration by one second per page.

center-content-horizontally-on-second-pa.title: Center Content Horizontally on Second PDF Page
center-content-horizontally-on-second-pa.description: Shows how to horizontally center a text fragment on the second page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's HorizontalAlignment property.

vertically-align-content-page-three.title: Vertically Align Content on Specific PDF Page
vertically-align-content-page-three.description: Shows how to center the existing content of page 3 vertically using PdfPageEditor’s VerticalAlignment property.

center-align-zoom-page-4.title: Center Align and Zoom Page 4 of PDF
center-align-zoom-page-4.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to center‑align the content and apply a 150% zoom to a specific page (page 4) of a PDF document.

add-10-percent-margins-to-pdf.title: Add 10% Margins to All PDF Pages
add-10-percent-margins-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to add uniform 10% margins to every page of a PDF, producing a resized document ready for printing.

set-fade-transition-for-all-pdf-pages.title: Set Fade Transition for All PDF Pages
set-fade-transition-for-all-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to apply a two‑second Fade transition to every page of a PDF using the PdfPageEditor facade.

rotate-pdf-pages-in-stream.title: Rotate PDF Pages from a Stream and Save Back
rotate-pdf-pages-in-stream.description: Shows how to load a PDF from a network stream, rotate its pages using PdfPageEditor, and write the modified PDF back to the same stream.

resize-pdf-pages-using-pdfpageeditor.title: Resize PDF Pages Using PdfPageEditor
resize-pdf-pages-using-pdfpageeditor.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, changes its page size to A4 with PdfPageEditor, and saves the modified document to a new file.

rotate-pdf-pages-with-pdfpageeditor-disp.title: Rotate PDF Pages Using PdfPageEditor with Proper Disposal
rotate-pdf-pages-with-pdfpageeditor-disp.description: Demonstrates rotating all pages of a PDF by 90 degrees using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor and correctly disposing the editor and document to release resources.

set-custom-page-size-with-pdfpageeditor.title: Set Custom Page Size with PdfPageEditor
set-custom-page-size-with-pdfpageeditor.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF's page dimensions to non‑standard values using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

rotate-pdf-pages-using-pdfpageeditor.title: Rotate All Pages of a PDF Using PdfPageEditor
rotate-pdf-pages-using-pdfpageeditor.description: Shows how to rotate every page of a PDF by setting the Rotation property of PdfPageEditor, applying the changes, and saving the modified document.

apply-page-transitions-fade-boxout-cover.title: Apply Page Transition Effects (Fade, BoxOut, Cover) to PDF
apply-page-transitions-fade-boxout-cover.description: Demonstrates how to set different page transition effects (Fade, BoxOut, Cover) on individual PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

set-pdf-page-zoom-using-double-precision.title: Set PDF Page Zoom Using Double Precision
set-pdf-page-zoom-using-double-precision.description: Demonstrates how to apply a zoom factor to a PDF using PdfPageEditor, casting a double to the required float for high‑resolution scaling.

set-slide-display-duration-pdf.title: Set Slide Display Duration for PDF Presentation
set-slide-display-duration-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to assign a fixed display time (in seconds) to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

set-page-content-alignment.title: Set Page Content Alignment Using PdfPageEditor
set-page-content-alignment.description: Shows how to change the horizontal alignment (left, center, or right) of existing PDF page content using the PdfPageEditor facade.

resize-pdf-contents-uniform-margins.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with Uniform Margins
resize-pdf-contents-uniform-margins.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to resize the contents of all pages in a PDF by applying equal percentage margins on every side and saving the result.

resize-pdf-contents-asymmetric-margins.title: Resize PDF Contents with Asymmetric Margins
resize-pdf-contents-asymmetric-margins.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's ContentsResizeParameters to apply different left, right, top, and bottom margins when resizing the contents of a PDF document.

resize-pdf-contents-top-bottom-margins.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with Top and Bottom Margins
resize-pdf-contents-top-bottom-margins.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to resize the contents of all pages by applying different top and bottom margin percentages.

rotate-pdf-page-and-reset-orientation.title: Rotate PDF Page and Reset Orientation
rotate-pdf-page-and-reset-orientation.description: Demonstrates how to rotate a specific PDF page using PdfPageEditor, save the change, and then restore the original page orientation.

resize-pdf-page-and-undo.title: Resize PDF Page and Undo Changes Using PdfPageEditor
resize-pdf-page-and-undo.description: Demonstrates changing a PDF page to a custom size with PdfPageEditor, saving the result, then restoring the original size to test undo functionality.

log-pdf-page-property-changes.title: Log PDF Page Property Changes Using PdfPageEditor
log-pdf-page-property-changes.description: Shows how to modify page properties such as zoom, rotation, and size with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor and record each modification to a log file for audit and debugging.

report-pdf-page-properties-before-after.title: Report PDF Page Properties Before and After Edits
report-pdf-page-properties-before-after.description: The example loads a PDF, prints each page's width, height, rotation and zoom, applies rotation, zoom and page‑size changes using PdfPageEditor, saves the edited file, and then prints the updated page properties.

rotate-encrypted-pdf-pages.title: Rotate Encrypted PDF Pages Using PdfPageEditor
rotate-encrypted-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF with a password, rotate all pages by 90 degrees using PdfPageEditor, and save the edited document.

modify-pdf-pages-preserve-signature.title: Modify PDF Pages While Preserving Digital Signature
modify-pdf-pages-preserve-signature.description: Demonstrates how to detect an existing digital signature in a PDF and rotate a specific page using PdfPageEditor, saving the document with an incremental update so the signature remains valid.

resize-pdf-pages-preserve-annotations.title: Resize PDF Pages While Preserving Annotations
resize-pdf-pages-preserve-annotations.description: Shows how to change the page size of a PDF using PdfPageEditor so that annotations and interactive elements remain functional after resizing.

rotate-pdf-preserve-form-fields.title: Rotate PDF Pages While Preserving Form Fields
rotate-pdf-preserve-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to rotate all pages of a PDF by 90° using the PdfPageEditor facade and keep existing form field data by exporting to FDF before rotation and importing it back afterward.

apply-transition-to-odd-pages.title: Apply Transition to Odd Pages in PDF
apply-transition-to-odd-pages.description: Demonstrates how to add a page transition effect only to odd‑numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

set-display-duration-even-pdf-pages.title: Set Display Duration for Even PDF Pages
set-display-duration-even-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to apply a custom display duration exclusively to even‑numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

zoom-pdf-pages-with-images.title: Zoom PDF Pages Containing Images
zoom-pdf-pages-with-images.description: Detects pages that contain at least one image and applies a zoom factor only to those pages using Aspose.Pdf facades.

resize-contents-on-text-pages.title: Resize PDF Page Contents Only on Pages Containing Text
resize-contents-on-text-pages.description: Shows how to identify pages that contain any text and then resize the contents of only those pages using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

apply-rotation-zoom-transition-to-pdf-sl.title: Apply Rotation, Zoom and Transition to PDF Slides
apply-rotation-zoom-transition-to-pdf-sl.description: Demonstrates using PdfPageEditor to rotate, zoom and add slide transition effects to all pages of a PDF presentation.

set-pdf-page-size-a4-landscape.title: Set PDF Page Size to A4 Landscape Using PdfPageEditor
set-pdf-page-size-a4-landscape.description: Demonstrates how to change all pages of a PDF to a custom A4 landscape size using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

set-pdf-page-size-to-letter-portrait.title: Set PDF Page Size to Letter Portrait
set-pdf-page-size-to-letter-portrait.description: Shows how to change all pages of a PDF to the standard Letter portrait dimensions using the PdfPageEditor facade.

rotate-landscape-pdf-pages.title: Rotate Landscape PDF Pages Using PdfPageEditor
rotate-landscape-pdf-pages.description: Detects pages with landscape orientation in a PDF and rotates them 90 degrees clockwise using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade. The modified document is then saved to a new file.

set-page-transition-duration-based-on-ti.title: Set Page Transition Duration Based on Title Length
set-page-transition-duration-based-on-ti.description: Shows how to apply a transition to each PDF page and adjust the transition duration according to the length of the page title using Aspose.Pdf.

adjust-pdf-page-zoom-based-on-word-count.title: Adjust PDF Page Zoom Based on Word Count
adjust-pdf-page-zoom-based-on-word-count.description: The example counts words on each PDF page and applies a higher zoom factor to pages with fewer words to improve readability. It uses Aspose.Pdf to extract text and Aspose.Pdf.Facades to modify page zoom settings.

batch-change-pdf-page-size.title: Batch Change PDF Page Size Using PdfPageEditor
batch-change-pdf-page-size.description: Demonstrates how to process multiple PDF files in a folder and set a specific page size for each document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

extract-rotate-selected-pdf-pages.title: Extract and Rotate Selected PDF Pages
extract-rotate-selected-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to extract specific pages from a PDF, rotate those pages, and save the result as a new PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

merge-pdfs-with-uniform-margins.title: Merge PDFs with Uniform Margins
merge-pdfs-with-uniform-margins.description: Shows how to apply consistent margins to multiple PDF files and then concatenate them into a single PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

resize-pdf-and-split-into-chapters.title: Resize PDF Pages and Split into Chapter Files
resize-pdf-and-split-into-chapters.description: Shows how to uniformly shrink the contents of a PDF and then split the resized document into separate chapter PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-slideshow-with-page-transitio.title: Create PDF Slideshow with Page Transitions
create-pdf-slideshow-with-page-transitio.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF slideshow by applying transition effects and display durations to each page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

set-boxout-transition-and-zoom-on-pdf-pa.title: Set BoxOut Transition and Zoom on a PDF Page
set-boxout-transition-and-zoom-on-pdf-pa.description: Demonstrates how to apply a BoxOut page transition and a zoom factor of 1.3 to page 2 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

center-page-content-set-display-duration.title: Center Page Content and Set Display Duration on PDF Page
center-page-content-set-display-duration.description: Demonstrates how to center the content of a specific PDF page and set its display duration to four seconds using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

add-5-percent-margins-and-print-pdf.title: Add 5% Margins and Print PDF with Auto‑Scaling
add-5-percent-margins-and-print-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a 5 % margin to every page of a PDF using PdfFileEditor and then print the modified document with auto‑resize using PdfViewer.

apply-15-percent-margins-booklet-pdf.title: Apply 15% Margins for Booklet Layout to PDF
apply-15-percent-margins-booklet-pdf.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.AddMarginsPct to add uniform 15% margins to all or selected pages of a PDF, preparing it for booklet printing.

rotate-pdf-pages-to-landscape.title: Rotate PDF Pages to Landscape for Brochure Printing
rotate-pdf-pages-to-landscape.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to rotate all pages 90° clockwise and set the page size to landscape A4 for brochure printing.

resize-pdf-pages-to-a3.title: Resize PDF Pages to A3 Using PdfPageEditor
resize-pdf-pages-to-a3.description: Shows how to change the size of all pages in a PDF to A3 using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

create-preview-final-pdfs-zoom.title: Create Preview and Final PDFs with Different Zoom Levels
create-preview-final-pdfs-zoom.description: Shows how to generate a preview PDF at 50% zoom and a final PDF at 100% zoom using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor, with automatic creation of a sample source PDF if it is missing.

adjust-pdf-page-properties-from-json.title: Adjust PDF Page Properties from JSON Configuration
adjust-pdf-page-properties-from-json.description: Demonstrates loading a JSON file to configure rotation, zoom, size, and transition settings for selected pages of PDFs using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

resize-pdf-contents-mixed-margins.title: Resize PDF Contents with Mixed Percentage and Absolute Margins
resize-pdf-contents-mixed-margins.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to resize page contents using a combination of percentage‑based and absolute margins, creating a hybrid resizing effect.

apply-cyclic-page-transitions.title: Apply Cyclic Page Transitions Using PdfPageEditor
apply-cyclic-page-transitions.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to assign different transition effects to each PDF page in a rotating pattern.

rotate-resize-zoom-pdf-pages.title: Rotate, Resize and Zoom PDF Pages
rotate-resize-zoom-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade to rotate pages, change the page size, apply a zoom factor, and save the transformed PDF.
